commit.message:
HDFS-17205. HdfsServerConstants.MIN_BLOCKS_FOR_WRITE should be configurable (#6112). Contributed by Haiyang Hu

Reviewed-by: He Xiaoqiao <hexiaoqiao@apache.org>
Signed-off-by: Ayush Saxena <ayushsaxena@apache.org>

verification.payload:
tree 81a1a037f3f93b60b94efe8147cde3eca34ba20f
parent 57100bba1bfd6963294181a2521396dc30c295f7
author huhaiyang <huhaiyang926@126.com> 1696576163 +0800
committer GitHub <noreply@github.com> 1696576163 +0530

HDFS-17205. HdfsServerConstants.MIN_BLOCKS_FOR_WRITE should be configurable (#6112). Contributed by Haiyang Hu

Reviewed-by: He Xiaoqiao <hexiaoqiao@apache.org>
Signed-off-by: Ayush Saxena <ayushsaxena@apache.org>

files.patch:
@@ -2445,6 +2445,15 @@
   </description>
 </property>
 
+<property>
+  <name>dfs.namenode.block-placement.min-blocks-for.write</name>
+  <value>1</value>
+  <description>
+    Setting the minimum number of blocks for write operations is used to calculate the space required
+    for write operations.
+  </description>
+</property>
+
 <property>
   <name>dfs.namenode.max.slowpeer.collect.nodes</name>
   <value>5</value>
